url.desc: The book of current orders on the currency pair;

param.name: pair
param.desc: One or various currency pairs separated by commas (example: BTC_USD,BTC_EUR);

param.name: limit

url.desc: Statistics on prices and volume of trades by currency pairs;
List of the deals on currency pairs;

param.name: pair
param.desc: One or various currency pairs separated by commas (example: BTC_USD,BTC_EUR);
